S

SceneManager - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.view
Singleton class responsible for managing the primary JavaFX Stage and handling scene transitions throughout the application.
setBotCount(int) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Sets the number of machine opponents for the upcoming game instance.
setDeckImage() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView

setMainStage(Stage) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.SceneManager
Assigns the primary stage for the application.
setStatus(String) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
 
setTopCard(Card) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
 
setTurnStyleClass(String) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
Updates the CSS style classes of the turn label to allow for distinct semantic rendering (e.g., normal turn vs player elimination alerts).
SEVEN - Enum constant in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
 
showCenterMessage(String, String, boolean) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.GameView
 
shuffle() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Deck
Shuffles the deck into a new random order without changing its contents.
SIX - Enum constant in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
 
size() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TablePile
Returns the number of cards currently in the pile.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.Main
Framework callback signaling runtime startup completion structures.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.AppInitializer
Configures the window parameters, registers the scene infrastructure, and sets the initial view.
startGame() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
startNewGame() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.GameController
Initializes the underlying logic models and starts a new instance of the game loop.
suit() - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
Returns the suit of this card as a lowercase string.

SUIT_DIAMONDS - Static variable in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
 
SUIT_HEARTS - Static variable in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
 
SUIT_SPADES - Static variable in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
 
switchScene(String) - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.view.SceneManager
Switches the current scene on the main stage to the specified FXML view.
